titleStmt.title: SII 17.192: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 192. (A.R. No. 171 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.
Commences with the praśasti, Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc., of the king and stops aftermentioning the above date.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Iruṉila[ maṭant] Aiyum porccayappāvaiyum
cirttaṉiccelviyum taṉ perun=teviy(ā)rāki Iṉpuṟa neṭitiyalūḻiyu ḷiṭatu
ṟai nāṭu ntuṭarvaṉavelip paṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷi cūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkai
yum naṇṇakkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭal yiḻattaracar taramuṭiyu
māṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cu
n=taramuṭiyu min=tira nāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu meṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil
cūṭum kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velait tolperuṅ kāva
ṟ pala paḻan=tivum ceruviṟ ciṉavil Irupattorukā laraicu kaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cān=ti mattivaraṇ karuti Iru
ttiya cempoṟ ṟiruttaku muḻiyumRead muṭiyum•payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta jaya ciṅka ṉaḷapperum
pukaḻoṭu piṭiyal Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamum navaṉati kulapperumalaikaḷu māpporu taṇṭālk koṇ
ṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa śrī rājentracoḷadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.192 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
